title: Circle Expands USDC to Solana and Arbitrum Networks
snippet: Circle has announced the expansion of USDC stablecoin to Solana and Arbitrum, bringing faster settlement to two major blockchain ecosystems.

title: Stripe Partners With Coinbase for Crypto On-Ramp Integration
snippet: Stripe and Coinbase have partnered to enable crypto on-ramp functionality for millions of online merchants through a simple API integration.
